TAMIL NADU
GOVERNMENT GAZETTE
PUBLISHED  BY  AUTHORITY
No. 21A]
CHENNAI, WEDNESDAY, JUNE 3, 2009
Vaikasi 20, Thiruvalluvar Aandu–2040
©
GOVERNMENT  OF   TAMIL  NADU
[Regd. No. TN/CCN/467/2009-11.
2009
[Price :  Rs. 167.20 Paise.
Part VI–Section  1
(Supplement)
NOTIFICATIONS   BY   HEADS  OF  DEPARTMENTS, ETC.
TAMIL  NADU  DENTAL COUNCIL
NOTICE OF ELECTION TO THE DENTAL COUNCIL OF INDIA, NEW DELHI
AND
TO THE TAML NADU DENTAL COUNCIL, CHENNAI.
(Ref. No. TNDC/GCP/PER/09.)
No. VI(1)/170/2009.
Notice under Dental Council of India Election Regulations, 1952—Section 3(3)
AND
Notice under Tamil Nadu Dental Council Rules—G.O. No. 2638/Health and Family Welfare
Department/Government of Tamil Nadu, dated 24-7-1950 — Election Rules — Section 2(3)
Election of one member to the Dental Council of India under Section 3(a) AND
Election of four members to the Tamil Nadu Dental Council under Section 21(a) AND
Election of four members to the Tamil Nadu Dental Council under Section 21(b) of The Dentists Act, 1948.
The Preliminary Electoral Roll as on 30-4-2009, showing the particulars of names of the registered Dentists to vote in
the elections mentioned above, is published in the Tamil Nadu Government Gazette, Issue No. 21A, dated 3rd June 2009.
Claims and Objections relating to the entries or omissions in the Preliminary Electoral Roll, with proof, shall be sent
by registered post only to the undersigned on or before 15th July 2009 at 5 p.m.
Claims and Objections received after the said date will not be accepted.
Tamil Nadu Dental Council,
R. RAGHU RAJAN,
Arihant Majestic Towers,
Registrar,
5-0-3,  # 216, J.N. Salai,
Tamil Nadu Dental Council
Koyambedu, Chennai-600 107,
and
26th May 2009.
Returning Officer—Elections to the
Dental Council of India, New Delhi and
Tamil Nadu Dental Council, Chennai.
DTP—VI-1 Sup. (21A)—1


TAMIL NADU DENTAL COUNCIL, CHENNAI-600107.

UNDER SECTION 3 (a)
2. FOUR MEMBERS TO THE TAMIL NADU DENTAL COUNCIL, CHENNAI
UNDER SECTION 21(a) OF THE DENTISTS ACT, 1948
AND
